net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Interface SimulationProperties

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    SimulationPropertiesImpl

    public interface SimulationProperties
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject
    A representation of the model object 'Simulation Properties'.

    The following features are supported:

    • Scale
    • Frames Per Second
    • Use Preset Settings
    • Simulate Without UI
    • Number Of Simulation Loops
    • Random Sort Between Loops
    • Use Foldable Seats
    • Bring Your Own Seat
    • Results
    • Sorting
    • Simulation Speed Factor
    • Seat Interference Standing Up Passenger Waiting Time
    • Seat Interference Process Time
    • Thread Sleep Time Default
    • Developer Mode
    • Luggage Properties
    • Passenger Properties
    • Passengers Boarding Per Minute
    See Also:
    CabinPackage.getSimulationProperties()

    • Method Detail

      • getScale

        int getScale()
        Returns the value of the 'Scale' attribute. The default value is "10".

        If the meaning of the 'Scale' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Scale' attribute.
        See Also:
        setScale(int), CabinPackage.getSimulationProperties_Scale()

      • setScale

        void setScale(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'Scale' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Scale' attribute.
        See Also:
        getScale()

      • getFramesPerSecond

        int getFramesPerSecond()
        Returns the value of the 'Frames Per Second' attribute. The default value is "5".

        If the meaning of the 'Frames Per Second' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Frames Per Second' attribute.
        See Also:
        setFramesPerSecond(int), CabinPackage.getSimulationProperties_FramesPerSecond()

      • setFramesPerSecond

        void setFramesPerSecond(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'Frames Per Second' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Frames Per Second' attribute.
        See Also:
        getFramesPerSecond()

      • isUsePresetSettings

        boolean isUsePresetSettings()
        Returns the value of the 'Use Preset Settings' attribute. The default value is "false".

        If the meaning of the 'Use Preset Settings' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Use Preset Settings' attribute.
        See Also:
        setUsePresetSettings(boolean), CabinPackage.getSimulationProperties_UsePresetSettings()

        Sets the value of the 'Use Preset Settings' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Use Preset Settings' attribute.
        See Also:
        isUsePresetSettings()

        boolean isSimulateWithoutUI()
        Returns the value of the 'Simulate Without UI' attribute. The default value is "false".

      • getNumberOfSimulationLoops

        int getNumberOfSimulationLoops()
        Returns the value of the 'Number Of Simulation Loops' attribute. The default value is "1".

        If the meaning of the 'Number Of Simulation Loops' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Number Of Simulation Loops' attribute.
        See Also:

      • isRandomSortBetweenLoops

        boolean isRandomSortBetweenLoops()
        Returns the value of the 'Random Sort Between Loops' attribute. The default value is "true".

        If the meaning of the 'Random Sort Between Loops' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Random Sort Between Loops' attribute.
        See Also:

      • getResults

        org.eclipse.emf.common.util.EList<SimulationResult> getResults()
        Returns the value of the 'Results' reference list. The list contents are of type SimulationResult.

        If the meaning of the 'Results' reference list isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Results' reference list.
        See Also:
        CabinPackage.getSimulationProperties_Results()

      • getSorting

        SortingStyle getSorting()
        Returns the value of the 'Sorting' attribute. The literals are from the enumeration SortingStyle.

        If the meaning of the 'Sorting' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Sorting' attribute.
        See Also:
        SortingStyle, setSorting(SortingStyle), CabinPackage.getSimulationProperties_Sorting()

        Sets the value of the 'Sorting' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Sorting' attribute.
        See Also:
        SortingStyle, getSorting()

        Returns the value of the 'Simulation Speed Factor' attribute. The default value is "10".

      • getPassengersBoardingPerMinute

        double getPassengersBoardingPerMinute()
        Returns the value of the 'Passengers Boarding Per Minute' attribute. The default value is "18".

        If the meaning of the 'Passengers Boarding Per Minute' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        the value of the 'Passengers Boarding Per Minute' attribute.
